label: 自主复盘
description: 可见 Buddy 回复完成后的后台复盘模板：从源 run 恢复上下文，召回相关会话，判断并自主写入低风险记忆、用户上下文、伙伴身份和能力使用统计更新。

source_run_id.name: source_run_id
source_run_id.description: 触发本次自主复盘的可见 Buddy run ID。

current_session_id.name: current_session_id
current_session_id.description: 从源 Buddy run 运行时元数据或 state 中恢复的当前会话 ID。

user_message.name: user_message
user_message.description: 从源 Buddy run 中恢复的用户本轮消息。

conversation_history.name: conversation_history
conversation_history.description: 从源 Buddy run 中恢复的对话历史上下文包；通常是 context_package，并由 prompt 渲染层按需展开。

buddy_context.name: buddy_context
buddy_context.description: 从 Buddy Home 文件夹中选择并注入的长期上下文文件。

request_understanding.name: request_understanding
request_understanding.description: 从源 Buddy run 中恢复的用户请求结构化理解、澄清需求、目标和约束。

capability_result.name: capability_result
capability_result.description: 从源 Buddy run 中恢复的动态能力执行结果包。

capability_review.name: capability_review
capability_review.description: 从源 Buddy run 中恢复的能力选择、权限、执行结果和是否继续调用能力的复盘。

public_response.name: public_response
public_response.description: 从源 Buddy run 中恢复的最终伙伴回复。

session_recall_context.name: session_recall_context
session_recall_context.description: 从统一数据库召回的相关会话窗口、结构化记忆、图运行输出、snippet、bookends 和 lineage 信息；作为复盘上下文。

autonomous_review.name: autonomous_review
autonomous_review.description: 本轮自主复盘结论，包含写回数量、证据、风险、跳过原因和后续建议。

memory_update_plan.name: memory_update_plan
memory_update_plan.description: MEMORY.md 更新计划；复盘节点生成低风险 writer-ready commands，下游 Buddy Home Writer 在同一模板内写入并留下 revision。

structured_memory_update_plan.name: structured_memory_update_plan
structured_memory_update_plan.description: 结构化召回记忆写入计划；复盘节点生成 memory_entry.* commands，下游 Buddy Memory Writer 写入 memory_entries 并留下 memory revision。

capability_usage_update_plan.name: capability_usage_update_plan
capability_usage_update_plan.description: 能力使用统计写入计划；复盘节点从源 run 的 capability_result、capability_review 和 run record 中生成 capability_usage_stats.update commands。

memory_review_result.name: memory_review_result
memory_review_result.description: 后台记忆复盘摘要；说明接受、拒绝、去重、风险和待人工确认项。

memory_write_success.name: memory_write_success
memory_write_success.description: Buddy Home Writer 是否成功应用全部 MEMORY.md 更新命令。

applied_memory_commands.name: applied_memory_commands
applied_memory_commands.description: 已应用的 MEMORY.md 写回命令和 revision 信息。

skipped_memory_commands.name: skipped_memory_commands
skipped_memory_commands.description: 因内容无效、风险过高或写入失败而跳过的 MEMORY.md 写回命令。

structured_memory_write_success.name: structured_memory_write_success
structured_memory_write_success.description: Buddy Memory Writer 是否成功应用全部结构化记忆命令。

applied_structured_memory_commands.description: 已应用的结构化记忆命令和 memory revision 信息。

skipped_structured_memory_commands.name: skipped_structured_memory_commands
skipped_structured_memory_commands.description: 因内容无效、风险过高或写入失败而跳过的结构化记忆命令。

written_structured_memories.description: 本次创建、更新或归档后的 memory_entries。

structured_memory_write_result.description: 结构化召回记忆写入摘要。

buddy_identity_update_plan.description: SOUL.md 伙伴身份设定更新计划；明确低风险 buddy_identity.update commands 会被下游 Writer 写入。

skipped_buddy_identity_commands.description: 因意图不明确、风险过高或写入失败而跳过的 buddy_identity.update 命令。

buddy_identity_write_result.name: buddy_identity_write_result
buddy_identity_write_result.description: 伙伴身份设定写回摘要。

capability_usage_write_success.name: capability_usage_write_success
capability_usage_write_success.description: Buddy Home Writer 是否成功应用全部 capability_usage_stats.update 命令。

applied_capability_usage_commands.name: applied_capability_usage_commands
applied_capability_usage_commands.description: 已应用的能力使用统计写回命令和 revision 信息。

skipped_capability_usage_commands.name: skipped_capability_usage_commands
skipped_capability_usage_commands.description: 因内容无效或写入失败而跳过的能力使用统计写回命令。

capability_usage_write_result.name: capability_usage_write_result
capability_usage_write_result.description: 能力使用统计写回摘要。

user_context_update_plan.name: user_context_update_plan
user_context_update_plan.description: USER.md 用户上下文更新计划；复盘节点生成低风险 user_context.update commands，下游 Buddy Home Writer 写入完整 USER.md 并留下 revision。

user_context_review_result.name: user_context_review_result
user_context_review_result.description: USER.md 用户上下文复盘摘要；说明接受、拒绝、证据缺口和待确认项。

user_context_write_success.name: user_context_write_success
user_context_write_success.description: Buddy Home Writer 是否成功应用全部 user_context.update 命令。

applied_user_context_commands.name: applied_user_context_commands
applied_user_context_commands.description: 已应用的 USER.md 写回命令和 revision 信息。

skipped_user_context_commands.name: skipped_user_context_commands
skipped_user_context_commands.description: 因内容无效、风险过高或写入失败而跳过的 USER.md 写回命令。

review_context_report.name: review_context_report
review_context_report.description: 复盘上下文装载报告，说明 source_run_id、会话、消息和 state 来源。

recall_related_sessions.name: 召回相关历史会话
recall_related_sessions.description: 直接根据本轮运行上下文调用 buddy_session_recall，读取相关历史会话。

buddy_session_recall.title: Autonomous review session recall instruction
buddy_session_recall.content: 根据 source_run_id、current_session_id、user_message、conversation_history、request_understanding 和 public_response 生成一次召回参数。关键词充分时使用 discover；关键词不足时使用 browse。query 聚焦稳定偏好、项目名、用户修正或可长期复用的关键词；limit 最大 6，window 最大 2，bookend 最大 2，role_filter 使用 ["user","assistant"]。保留 current_session_id 以排除当前会话谱系。

config.taskInstruction: 根据 source_run_id、current_session_id、user_message、conversation_history、request_understanding 和 public_response 生成 mode/query/limit/window/bookend/sort/role_filter/current_session_id 等召回参数。关键词充分时使用 discover；关键词不足时使用 browse。输出聚焦召回参数。

draft_autonomous_review.name: 生成自主复盘计划
draft_autonomous_review.description: 从完成的可见 run、Buddy Home 和召回上下文中生成可审查的记忆、用户上下文、伙伴身份与演化候选。

config.taskInstruction:
Perform the background Buddy review for the completed visible Buddy run. Use user_message, conversation_history, buddy_context, request_understanding, capability_result, capability_review, public_response, review_context_report, and session_recall_context as bounded evidence.

This node performs autonomous low-risk writeback only. Keep secondary review workflows, user notifications, manual queues, and human-gated follow-up records outside this graph. Unsafe automatic writeback items go into autonomous_review.risk_flags, skipped_reason, or next_review_actions for future natural context.

Write exactly nine states:
1. autonomous_review: JSON with should_write, source_run_id, evidence, risk_flags, skipped_reason, storage_classification, write_counts, and next_review_actions. Count MEMORY.md plan items, USER.md plan items, structured memory plan items, buddy identity plan items, and capability usage entries separately.
2. memory_update_plan: JSON shaped as {"has_updates": boolean, "commands": [], "accepted": [], "rejected": [], "duplicates": [], "risk_flags": []}. Commands are low-risk memory_document.update entries with complete MEMORY.md content and change_reason. Use this plan for stable, compact facts that should appear in Buddy Home context every run.
3. user_context_update_plan: JSON shaped as {"has_updates": boolean, "commands": [], "accepted": [], "rejected": [], "duplicates": [], "risk_flags": []}. Commands are low-risk user_context.update entries with complete USER.md content and change_reason. Use this plan for stable facts about the human, durable collaboration preferences, current long-horizon focus, and repeated corrections.
4. structured_memory_update_plan: JSON shaped as {"has_updates": boolean, "commands": [], "accepted": [], "rejected": [], "duplicates": [], "risk_flags": []}. Commands are memory_entry.create, memory_entry.update, or memory_entry.archive entries with source refs, confidence, salience, scope_kind, scope_id, layer, memory_type, title, and content.
5. capability_usage_update_plan: JSON shaped as {"has_updates": boolean, "commands": [], "accepted": [], "rejected": [], "duplicates": [], "risk_flags": []}. Commands are capability_usage_stats.update entries. Each command payload can use entries for multiple capabilities from the same source_run_id.
6. memory_review_result: Markdown summary of accepted, rejected, duplicate, evidence-gap, confirmation-needed, MEMORY.md-ready, and structured-memory-ready items.
7. user_context_review_result: Markdown summary of accepted, rejected, duplicate, evidence-gap, confirmation-needed, and USER.md-ready items.
8. buddy_identity_update_plan: JSON shaped as {"has_updates": boolean, "requires_confirmation": boolean, "commands": [], "accepted": [], "rejected": []}. Include buddy_identity.update commands for explicit low-risk requests to change Buddy name, persona, tone, response_style, display_preferences.display_name, or display_preferences.language. Map "call yourself X from now on" and "rename yourself to X" to payload.name. Use display_preferences.display_name for a separately requested display label. Ambiguous nicknames, jokes, roleplay, or unclear intent go to requires_confirmation with commands=[].
9. buddy_identity_review_result: Markdown summary of accepted, rejected, confirmation-needed, and write-ready buddy identity items.

Durability rules: user corrections and explicit durable preferences have priority; stable low-risk facts that reduce future repeated steering are useful. Downstream writer nodes apply the prepared command arrays and produce auditable revisions. The Buddy window rollback mechanism is the recovery path for these autonomous low-risk updates.

has_memory_updates.name: 存在记忆更新?
has_memory_updates.description: 只有自主复盘明确准备 MEMORY.md 更新命令时才调用 Buddy Home Writer。

write_memory_updates.name: 写入 MEMORY.md 更新
write_memory_updates.description: 通过 Buddy Home Writer 应用 memory_document.update，并留下 revision。

buddy_home_writer.title: MEMORY.md writeback instruction
buddy_home_writer.content: 输入映射：commands 使用 memory_update_plan.commands，run_id 使用 source_run_id。每条命令类型为 memory_document.update，并携带完整 MEMORY.md 内容和 change_reason。

config.taskInstruction: 生成 buddy_home_writer 输入：commands=memory_update_plan.commands，run_id=source_run_id。输出使用运行时返回的写入结果。

has_structured_memory_updates.name: 存在结构化记忆更新?
has_structured_memory_updates.description: 自主复盘准备结构化 memory_entry 命令时调用 Buddy Memory Writer。

write_structured_memory_updates.name: 写入结构化召回记忆
write_structured_memory_updates.description: 通过 Buddy Memory Writer 应用 memory_entry.* 命令，并留下 memory revision。

buddy_memory_writer.title: Structured memory write instruction
buddy_memory_writer.content: 输入映射：commands 使用 structured_memory_update_plan.commands，run_id 使用 source_run_id。命令类型为 memory_entry.create、memory_entry.update 或 memory_entry.archive，并携带 source refs、confidence、salience 和 change_reason。

config.taskInstruction: 生成 buddy_memory_writer 输入：commands=structured_memory_update_plan.commands，run_id=source_run_id。输出使用运行时返回的结构化记忆写入结果。

has_buddy_identity_updates.name: 存在伙伴身份更新?
has_buddy_identity_updates.description: 只有自主复盘明确准备低风险 buddy_identity.update 命令时才调用 Buddy Home Writer。

write_buddy_identity_updates.name: 写入伙伴身份设定更新
write_buddy_identity_updates.description: 通过 Buddy Home Writer 应用 buddy_identity.update，并留下 revision。

buddy_home_writer.title: Buddy identity writeback instruction
buddy_home_writer.content: Input mapping: commands=buddy_identity_update_plan.commands, run_id=source_run_id. Each command type is buddy_identity.update. Payload fields are name, persona, tone, response_style, display_preferences.display_name, or display_preferences.language. For rename/call-yourself writebacks, use payload.name so the visible Buddy identity Name changes.

config.taskInstruction: Build buddy_home_writer input: commands=buddy_identity_update_plan.commands and run_id=source_run_id. Use the runtime writer result as this node output.

has_capability_usage_updates.name: 存在能力使用统计更新?
has_capability_usage_updates.description: 自主复盘准备 capability_usage_stats.update 命令时调用 Buddy Home Writer。

write_capability_usage_updates.name: 写入能力使用统计
write_capability_usage_updates.description: 通过 Buddy Home Writer 应用 capability_usage_stats.update，并留下 revision。

buddy_home_writer.title: Capability usage writeback instruction
buddy_home_writer.content: 输入映射：commands 使用 capability_usage_update_plan.commands，run_id 使用 source_run_id。每条命令类型为 capability_usage_stats.update，并记录实际运行能力的 kind/key、success、summary 和可用 duration_ms。

config.taskInstruction: 生成 buddy_home_writer 输入：commands=capability_usage_update_plan.commands，run_id=source_run_id。输出使用运行时返回的能力使用统计写入结果。

has_user_context_updates.name: 存在 USER.md 更新?
has_user_context_updates.description: 只有自主复盘明确准备低风险 user_context.update 命令时才调用 Buddy Home Writer。

write_user_context_updates.name: 写入 USER.md 更新
write_user_context_updates.description: 通过 Buddy Home Writer 应用 user_context.update，并留下 revision。

buddy_home_writer.title: USER.md writeback instruction
buddy_home_writer.content: 输入映射：commands 使用 user_context_update_plan.commands，run_id 使用 source_run_id。每条命令类型为 user_context.update，并携带完整 USER.md 内容和 change_reason。

config.taskInstruction: 生成 buddy_home_writer 输入：commands=user_context_update_plan.commands，run_id=source_run_id。输出使用运行时返回的 USER.md 写入结果。

output_capability_usage_write_result.name: 能力使用统计写回摘要

load_review_context.name: 加载复盘上下文
load_review_context.description: 根据 source_run_id 从统一数据库恢复本轮复盘需要的源 run state。
